title: Section 12
content: Any person who— (a) falsely represents that he is a notary without being appointed as such, or (b) practises as a notary or does any notarial act in contravention of section 9, shall be punishable with imprisonment for a term which may extend to 1 [one year], or with fine, or with both.
footnote: 1. Subs. by s. 6, ibid., for "three months" (w.e.f. 17-12-1999).
